title: Taint Node and Add Toleration
description:
Taint a node with `dedicated=gpu:NoSchedule`, then observe that a Pod without a toleration stays Pending while a Pod with a matching toleration schedules on the tainted node. This models dedicated node pools (GPU, high-memory) where only specific workloads are allowed.

**Common Pitfalls:** A toleration only permits scheduling on a tainted node — it does not force it. Without `nodeAffinity` or `nodeSelector`, the tolerated pod may schedule on any node. Remember to untaint the node after the exercise or other workloads may be blocked.
steps: Taint a node: kubectl taint node <node-name> dedicated=gpu:NoSchedule
Apply the manifest with both Pod definitions
Observe 'gpu-intolerant' Pod stays Pending (no toleration for the taint)
Observe 'gpu-worker' Pod schedules on the tainted node (has matching toleration)
Untaint the node: kubectl taint node <node-name> dedicated=gpu:NoSchedule-
hints: tolerations is a list under spec — each item has key, operator, value, and effect
operator: Equal requires key, value, and effect to all match the taint
A pod without any tolerations cannot schedule on a NoSchedule tainted node
kubectl describe pod <name> Events shows: '0/1 nodes are available: 1 node(s) had untolerated taint'
The toleration on gpu-worker must match the taint: key='dedicated', value='gpu', effect='NoSchedule'

editor_config.initial_code:
# Pod WITHOUT toleration — will be Pending on tainted node
apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
metadata:
  name: gpu-intolerant
spec:
  containers:
  - name: app
    image: busybox
    command: ['sh', '-c', 'echo running && sleep 3600']
---
# Pod WITH matching toleration — can schedule on tainted node
apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
metadata:
  name: gpu-worker
spec:
  tolerations:
  - key: # TODO: use 'dedicated'
    operator: Equal
    value: # TODO: use 'gpu'
    effect: # TODO: use 'NoSchedule'
  containers:
  - name: worker
    image: busybox
    command: ['sh', '-c', 'echo gpu workload running && sleep 3600']

_solution.code_solution:
# Pod WITHOUT toleration — will be Pending on tainted node
apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
metadata:
  name: gpu-intolerant
spec:
  containers:
  - name: app
    image: busybox
    command: ['sh', '-c', 'echo running && sleep 3600']
---
# Pod WITH matching toleration — can schedule on tainted node
apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
metadata:
  name: gpu-worker
spec:
  tolerations:
  - key: "dedicated"
    operator: Equal
    value: "gpu"
    effect: NoSchedule
  containers:
  - name: worker
    image: busybox
    command: ['sh', '-c', 'echo gpu workload running && sleep 3600']
_solution.validation_script:
#!/bin/bash
set -e

echo 'Checking Pod gpu-worker exists...'
if ! kubectl get pod gpu-worker &>/dev/null; then
  echo '✗ Pod gpu-worker not found'
  exit 1
fi
echo '✓ Pod gpu-worker exists'

echo 'Checking gpu-worker has toleration for dedicated=gpu:NoSchedule...'
TOL_KEY=$(kubectl get pod gpu-worker -o jsonpath='{.spec.tolerations[?(@.key=="dedicated")].key}')
TOL_VAL=$(kubectl get pod gpu-worker -o jsonpath='{.spec.tolerations[?(@.key=="dedicated")].value}')
TOL_EFF=$(kubectl get pod gpu-worker -o jsonpath='{.spec.tolerations[?(@.key=="dedicated")].effect}')

if [ "$TOL_KEY" != "dedicated" ]; then
  echo '✗ Toleration key "dedicated" not found on gpu-worker'
  exit 1
fi
if [ "$TOL_VAL" != "gpu" ]; then
  echo "✗ Toleration value expected 'gpu', got '$TOL_VAL'"
  exit 1
fi
if [ "$TOL_EFF" != "NoSchedule" ]; then
  echo "✗ Toleration effect expected 'NoSchedule', got '$TOL_EFF'"
  exit 1
fi
echo '✓ gpu-worker has correct toleration (dedicated=gpu:NoSchedule)'

echo 'Checking Pod gpu-intolerant exists...'
if ! kubectl get pod gpu-intolerant &>/dev/null; then
  echo '✗ Pod gpu-intolerant not found'
  exit 1
fi
echo '✓ Pod gpu-intolerant exists'

echo 'Checking gpu-intolerant has NO dedicated toleration...'
INTOL_KEY=$(kubectl get pod gpu-intolerant -o jsonpath='{.spec.tolerations[?(@.key=="dedicated")].key}')
if [ "$INTOL_KEY" = "dedicated" ]; then
  echo '✗ gpu-intolerant should NOT have a dedicated toleration'
  exit 1
fi
echo '✓ gpu-intolerant correctly has no dedicated toleration'

echo ''
echo 'All checks passed!'
exit 0
